# services.umami

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.umami`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.umami.createPostgresqlDatabase` | `boolean` | Whether to automatically create the database for Umami using PostgreSQL. Both the database name and username will be `umami`, and the connection is made through unix sockets using peer authentication. |
| `services.umami.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable umami. |
| `services.umami.package` | `package` | The umami package to use. |
| `services.umami.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)` | Additional configuration (environment variables) for Umami, see <https://umami.is/docs/environment-variables> for supported values. |
| `services.umami.settings.APP_SECRET_FILE` | `null or string` | A file containing a secure random string. This is used for signing user sessions. The contents of the file are read through systemd credentials, therefore the user running umami does not need permissions to read the file. If you wish to set this to a string instead (not recommended since it will be placed world-readable in the Nix store), you can use the APP_SECRET option. |
| `services.umami.settings.BASE_PATH` | `string` | Allows you to host Umami under a subdirectory. You may need to update your reverse proxy settings to correctly handle the BASE_PATH prefix. |
| `services.umami.settings.COLLECT_API_ENDPOINT` | `null or string` | Allows you to send metrics to a location different than the default `/api/send`. |
| `services.umami.settings.DATABASE_URL` | `null or string` | Connection string for the database. Must start with `postgresql://` or `postgres://`. |
| `services.umami.settings.DATABASE_URL_FILE` | `null or string` | A file containing a connection string for the database. The connection string must start with `postgresql://` or `postgres://`. The contents of the file are read through systemd credentials, therefore the user running umami does not need permissions to read the file. |
| `services.umami.settings.DISABLE_TELEMETRY` | `boolean` | Umami collects completely anonymous telemetry data in order help improve the application. You can choose to disable this if you don't want to participate. |
| `services.umami.settings.DISABLE_UPDATES` | `boolean` | Disables the check for new versions of Umami. |
| `services.umami.settings.HOSTNAME` | `string` | The address to listen on. |
| `services.umami.settings.PORT` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on. |
| `services.umami.settings.TRACKER_SCRIPT_NAME` | `list of string` | Allows you to assign a custom name to the tracker script different from the default `script.js`. |
